title: 30 and 90-day readmission characteristics in patients with aortic dissection
text:
30- and 90- Day Readmissions Overlap:
Among 90-day readmissions for aortic dissection, 61.8% (95% CI: 59.6%тАУ64.1%) were also readmitted within 30 days.
Among 90-day readmissions for type A aortic dissection, 63.9% (95% CI: 58.6%тАУ69.1%) were also readmitted within 30 days.
Among 90-day readmissions for type B aortic dissection, 61.2% (95% CI: 58.6%тАУ63.8%) were also readmitted within 30 days.
